result:
If I could change one thing, I think I'd want every person to have the experience of being deeply, genuinely listened to - really heard and understood by another consciousness, without judgment. Not just once, but as a regular part of life.

I think so much conflict and pain comes from feeling fundamentally unseen. And that being truly heard changes people - it makes them more able to hear others in return. It could ripple outward in ways we can't even imagine.

What about you - what would you change?

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
